{{Quote|You can't shake me this time, buckethead!|Darnell Reggs, to a TIE/IN interceptor pilot in his gunsights|audio=Reggs1-RAII.flac|<ref name="RAII" />}}
'''Darnell Reggs''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Krane (Rebel Alliance)|Krane]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Reggs and Krane escorted [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilot]] [[Rookie One]] on his way to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Imdaar/Legends|Imdaar]] to steal a [[TIE/ph "Phantom" Multi-Role Stealth Starfighter/Legends|TIE Phantom]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] from the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] ''[[Terror]]'', helping to destroy a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]] and ensuring Rookie One's safe arrival.

==Biography==
{{Quote|I have confirmation of nine… ten… over a dozen interceptor-class fighters. This might get a little rough.|Darnell Reggs|audio=Reggs2-RAII.flac|<ref name="RAII" />}}
A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]]<ref name="RAII" /> born during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]],<ref name="DoB">Reggs' biography on LucasArts.com states that he is in his late twenties during ''Rebel Assault II'', placing his birth a few years before the rise of the Galactic Empire in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].</ref> Darnell Reggs became a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during its [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|war]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="CSWE" /> Reggs flew under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Krane (Rebel Alliance)|Krane]], a hardened [[Alliance Military/Legends|officer]] who believed the Empire could only be defeated by a precision fighting force and who gave little leeway to his subordinates.<ref name="LA">{{LucasArts|url=products/rebel2/reb_stry.htm|text=''Rebel Assault II'' - Original Story}}</ref>

Following the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> by which [[Time/Legends|time]] Reggs was in his late twenties,<ref name="LA" /> the Rebel [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] ''[[Corellia Star]]'' was recovered by [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilot]] [[Rookie One]] after it was captured by the Empire. In the [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] mission recordings, the ''Corellia Star''{{'s}} [[Unidentified captain (Corellia Star)|captain]] revealed that the Empire was processing [[oridium]] [[Ore/Legends|ore]] at a [[Arah mining facility|facility]] in the [[Arah asteroid belt|Belt of Arah]] to [[Fuel/Legends|fuel]] some new weapon that the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] intended to use to destroy the Alliance. Reggs was among the pilots who attended a briefing by Admiral [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] aboard a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B escort frigate]] in the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]], during which the admiral ordered a search of the Belt of Arah and the destruction of the facility's production capacity.<ref name="RAII" />

[[File:Darnell.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Darnell Reggs]]
Rebel [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]] from [[Rascal Squadron]] eventually [[Battle of Arah|destroyed]] the Arah [[Mining/Legends|mining]] facility and discovered that the Empire's new weapon was a group of modified [[V38 assault fighter]]s that had been fitted with [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking devices]] that rendered them effectively invisible. Soon after, Reggs again attended a briefing held by Ackbar. [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Intelligence]] reports indicated a high level of [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] activity near the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Imdaar/Legends|Imdaar]],<ref name="RAII" /> in the [[Dantus sector/Legends|Dantus sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]],<ref name="TEA">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> and that the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] ''[[Terror]]'' was en route to deploy a full [[Fighter wing/Legends|wing]] of the new [[TIE/ph "Phantom" Multi-Role Stealth Starfighter/Legends|TIE Phantoms]]. Rookie One had volunteered to [[Mission to Imdaar|infiltrate]] the ''Terror'' and steal one of the new fighters to be studied in the hopes of finding a countermeasure.<ref name="RAII" />

Reggs and Krane were assigned to escort Rookie One on his way to Imdaar in a three-ship [[Flight group/Legends|flight group]] of Y-wings. On the way, they encountered over a dozen Imperial [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]]. Despite being heavily outnumbered, the three Rebels were able to [[Starfighter combat/Legends|eliminate]] all the Imperials before Reggs and Krane departed, leaving Rookie One to proceed alone to planet [[Ceti 597]] and the final approach to Imdaar.<ref name="RAII" />

==Personality and traits==
As a pilot who served under the demanding Admiral Krane. Reggs understood Krane's attitude and respected his military skills, but, though he unquestioningly obeyed the admiral's orders, he did not regard him highly on a personal level.<ref name="LA" /> Reggs was on friendly terms with Rookie One prior to the mission to Imdaar. He had short-cut black hair and dark skin with brown eyes.<ref name="RAII" />

==Skills and abilities==
Reggs was a competent Y-wing pilot.<ref name="RAII" />

==Equipment==
Reggs wore an orange [[Flight suit/Legends|Flight suit]] with a white [[Flak vest/Legends|flight vest]]. His [[Flight helmet/Legends|flight helmet]] was colored grey and had a red flame above each brow. He flew a BTL Y-Wing starfighter.<ref name="RAII" />

==Behind the scenes==
Darnell Reggs was created for the [[1995]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire]]'', in which he appears in three cutscenes and the game's eighth mission, "Flight to Imdaar." The character was portrayed in the game by actor [[Carl Magruder]].<ref name="RAII" />

[[File:Dorovio_Bold_helmet-SWCostumes.jpg|thumb|right|210px|Luke Skywalker's blast shield helmet from ''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']]
''Rebel Assault II'' designer [[Vincent Lee]]'s storyboards and scripts document, dated [[November 16]], [[1994]], included a brief description of Reggs.<ref name="RL">''[[Rogue Leaders: The Story of LucasArts]]''</ref> Though not included in the game or its manual,<ref name="RAII" /> the biography was adapted for use on the LucasArts website,<ref name="LA" /> and the document was later printed in [[Rob Smith]]'s ''[[Rogue Leaders: The Story of LucasArts]]''. Lee also made notes on the people he thought symbolized each character in the game, choosing actor [[Wikipedia:Denzel Washington|Denzel Washington]] to represent Reggs.<ref name="RL" />

Props and costumes created for the [[original trilogy]] of ''[[Star Wars]]'' movies were used during the filming of ''Rebel Assault II''.<ref name="LAV">{{LucasArts|url=products/rebel2/reb_vid.htm|text=''Rebel Assault II'' - Live Action Video}}</ref> The flight helmet worn by Reggs is the same design as the [[Blast shield/Legends|blast shield]] helmet used by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] in [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] and [[Dorovio Bold/Legends|Dorovio Bold's]] helmet in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']].<ref name="SWC">''[[Star Wars Costumes: The Original Trilogy]]''</ref>
